{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = scythe (Cradle)
| introduced = Blackflame
}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|A door at the end of the compound is marked with the image of a scythe.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c13">''Blackflame'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
